description: Introduction to algebraic topology. Emphasis on geometric aspects, including two-dimensional manifolds, the fundamental group, covering spaces, basic simplicial homology theory, the Euler-Poincare formula, and homotopy classes of mappings.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (MATH 551and541) or graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (MATH 551and541) or graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program
